subcodes.first_line: O thou who art pondering upon the Kingdom of Existence!  Certain foolish souls in the world of being strive for keenness of vision with their gaze fixed firmly upon this contingent realm
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متفکر در ملکوت وجود بی خردانی در ملک وجود حیز ناسوت نظر نمودند و حدت بصر
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @harmony of science and religion, @limits of the intellect
